programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A precognitive young woman sees herself being murdered but it is her unknown twin sister who turns up dead

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: While Mary Beth recovers from breast surgery and mulls retirement Chris has her prized Corvette stolen but it may provide her a leg up on the sergeants exam Meanwhile an informant is murdered leaving Chris to find out the who and why

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: A vengeance-seeking fiend injects Starsky with a chemical compound that will kill him in 24 hours sparking Starsky and Hutch to race against time to track down the criminal and his poison formula so an antidote can be created

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When the families of all his Vietnam flight crew are kidnapped including Dom and Cait; Hawke must follow the clues and a mysterious friend to save them

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan track down a box used to perform a dangerous magic trick

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold but have to put discussion on hold while they repo repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer Next Sonia and Ronnies easy day at the salon gets disastrous when the should-be debtor serves Sonia with a lawsuit And finally Froy and Carlos head out to a worksite to repo the bulldozer that Carlos should have been training for

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonias grasp sending them on a violent high speed chase Matt offends a pretty RO who seeks womanly revenge and Froy and Carlos go undercover at a lowrider show And when Sonia announces a dangerous plan to save the company from the lawsuit the team must decide whether theyre willing to risk it all

programme.title: Sheriff of Tombstone
programme.desc:
Roy Rogers and George Gabby Hayes in Sheriff of Tombstone 1941
The mayor has sent for a gunslinger who though appearing to clean up the town is really to be the mayors means of taking the town over When Roy and Gabby arrive in Tombstone Roy is mistaken for the gunslinger Just as Roy is ready to expose the mayor the real gunslinger shows up

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy woman makes the mistake of murdering her husband while an escaped mental patient dressed in a Santa Claus outfit is on the loose

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bum displays his ability to resurrect himself

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric feels responsible for an elderly woman who is committed to a mental institution by her daughter after she reports to the police she saw Eric in his werewolf form He takes a job as a custodian at the institution to look after her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: It has been more than forty years since Nick has seen his close friend Katherine Barrington and her secretary Madelyn Pinchot

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A devious antiques dealer uses a magic lantern to travel back to the Civil War so he can steal artifacts from dead soldiers

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A gorilla steals Mrs Howells diamond brooch and while Mr Howell offers a reward to the other castaways for finding it the gorilla kidnaps Mrs Howell too

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: An eccentric area hermit furtively exchanges miscellaneous items for his subsistence but when he trades for McCoy assets Amos has him arrested for theft but is regretful when a hearing to put the man under state supervision ensues

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The stakes escalate as Flora Kate and Hassie refuse to go to the annual Grange Dance with Grandpa Luke and Tommy unless they receive a proper apology for Grandpas remarks to Tommy about how a man should handle women

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is investigating a madman who is blowing up high-rise buildings though CONTROL is not sure how he is doing it

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Agent 86 has amnesia after he hears about a KAOS plot

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Bj hires the eyes of Texas girls to help find his missing sister

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Tiger a female underground agent is arrested while trying to document some secret German bases and is held in Paris for questioning So Hogan and LeBeau become stowaways aboard Klinks staff car and head for Paris to free her

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While trying to free the underground agent Tiger in Paris Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys must scheme to procure new engines for their beloved boat before Binghamton ships the 73 Crew out to a new location

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton angers some of the native islanders then must make amends with them in order to make a good impression on a certain VIP who is due soon for a visit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer makes friends with a hillbilly named Branch

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter and an old war buddy credit each other for being war heroes

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A gorilla steals Mrs Howells diamond brooch and while Mr Howell offers a reward to the other castaways for finding it the gorilla kidnaps Mrs Howell too

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Savings and loan president Tyler Dickinson murders investment counselor Cy Winters and then Binzers girlfriend Kim Sarrason Binzer is first devastated and then vindictive Can Dan prevent Binzer from exacting vigilante justice

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A yacht trip becomes dangerous when one of the Harts guests is blackmailed into running drugs

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: There is only one week left until nominations close for a VITA the Vermont Industry TV award and Dick is advised to animate his performance but he is against the idea of competition Michael is leading the charge towards an upbeat show

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is the substitute host of a childrens TV show Meanwhile Stephanie believes she has put on weight

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan reels in a crate of vegetable seeds from the lagoon but fails to notice the warning on the crate that the seeds are radioactive

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Ryans old school friend Ashley arrives and takes her and Mitch to a research lab where she and her husband work on developing an inanimate laser After Mitch Ryan and Ashley accidentally step into the laser they slide in time to a parallel universe where they must fight for their lives against the creatures inhabiting the world

programme.title: Operatino Repo
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist Lyndah and Froy head to the Hollywood Hills to find a luxury sedan

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work but have their anger management sessions had any effect Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls whove got the skills to protect their car Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when theyre forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients and Matt Lou and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hazzard Jail is the meeting place for Black Jack Bender and a group of syndicate kingpins who are conspiring to smuggle illegal weapons in the area Bo and Luke - with a little help from Uncle Jesse Daisy and their friends Cletus and Cooter - use some good ol southern smarts to keep the mobsters at bay until the FBI can arrive to investigate

programme.title: Hercules 216
programme.desc: Hercules 216

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: When large scale blackouts begin to occur in cities with portals Taelon technology is blamed Augur and Liam investigate the death of a portal worker by a strange creature that feeds on energy and is particularly attracted to the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave with Alec and facing death by suffocation Arcane reviews his life in a grand soliloquy He can lie to others but ultimately can he lie to himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: 40 years ago a plane carrying valuable Egyptian antiquities and a mummy crashed in the swamp Arcane supports an expedition to find it but his interest is far more than financial

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A wandering energy force inhabits the body of Alpha technician Anton Zoref turning him into an energy absorbing being

programme.title: Dreamscape
programme.desc: A man who can enter and manipulate peoples dreams is recruited by a government agency to help cure the President of the United States of his nightmares about nuclear war but stumbles upon an assassination plot

programme.title: The Dukes Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An old college friend of Steves is now a father - and part of a vigilante group fed up with the rampant crime in their neighborhood Their latest crackdown however leaves a police informer dead

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs and company pretend to have found a means of synthesizing diamonds in order to con a dictator out of a priceless uncut diamond that will finance his government and secure his power

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being on the run for 6 months Richard Kimble falls in love with a beautiful woman who has a young son She also has a physically abusive estranged husband that wants Kimble out of town or dead

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A handsome stranger saves Audras life during a horse stampede and she quickly becomes attached to him unaware of his involvement in a series of robberies in the Valley

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked by Matt Reardon a gunfighter to help him with a mission after he rescues Cheyenne from a fight Reardon wants to repay a debt to the widow of the first man he killed who was also his partner Her son gets in the way

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coming from a history of drinking heavily and drug abuse, Nick Burnham was able to turn his life around completely by prioritizing his MMA training. Now, at HK38, Nick is looking to take the Lightweight title away from Dauda Keita in a fight that goes the distance!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tim Baker v. Dan Cane

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Changing your lifestyle from one of jail and rebellion to one of discipline and MMA is not an easy task, but Todd Stoute is prrof that it is possible to make that switch. At HK38, he is up against Clay Davidson and is looking for the win.

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 34 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Phil Towler vs. Devon Smith; Blake Sigvaldason vs. Ashmat Bashir.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While everyone is sleeping Herc lands on a planet in search of a buried treasure Monster Minds force them to flee and Herc sets a new course to find Audric to make up for lost time that takes them through a whole galaxy controlled by Saw Boss

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss blackmails King Phineas into luring Jayce with an image of his father to a planet where Saw Boss is ready to destroy him Saw Boss makes good his threat to pull the Vortex Plug which would allow the atmosphere of the upper level

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall
